note.item: First version, adapted from correponding Kandanda userupdate plugin
Adaption for WickedTeam ported to Joomla 4 using Joomla fields
Code refactoring and cleanup, added update server and changelog url, added new plugin parameters for more flexible configuration
Plugin is now compatible with Joomla 4 only, minimum version is now 2.0.0
Improved change detection for Joomla 4 Wickedteam fields, including normalized date/phone handling and repeatable field row diffs
Repeatable field updates now show only changed row columns and resolve nested field IDs to actual field names
